channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Wayne Gretzky has been helping Alex Ovechkin long before this record goal chase
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A little more than three decades before Alex Ovechkin's pursuit of Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record, the “Great One” had his own chase. Gretzky was in hot pursuit of Gordie Howe's record in the spring of 1994. Howe was there when Gretzky tied and passed him.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: MASTERS '25: Augusta's 3rd hole so cleverly designed it doesn't get tweaked
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The shortest par 4 at Augusta National is the same distance — all of 350 yards — as it was when the first Masters was held in 1934. There are no water hazards to be found. There is one bunker left of the green.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Will Detroit Pistons get 5 or 6 seed in playoffs? Breaking down race with Bucks
item.description: The Milwaukee Bucks are just one game behind the Detroit Pistons for the No. 5 seed. With the race remaining tight, the stakes are high as both teams play each other in their final two games of the regular season.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Verstappen takes pole for Sunday's F1 Japanese Grand Prix ahead of Norris and Piastri
item.description: Max Verstappen of Red Bull will start from pole position in the Japanese Grand Prix after turning the top time in qualifying on Saturday in his final attempt.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Wade, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: South Carolina returns to the NCAA title game and gets a rematch of 2022 against Bueckers and UConn
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — The journey has been more challenging than usual, but Dawn Staley and defending national champion South Carolina are still getting the job done.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Leigh Longhorns trample visiting Leland as six-run second inning sets the tone for run-rule win in San Jose
item.description: Leigh baseball is on a roll early this season, and the Longhorns look primed for another strong year under Leland alumnus Drew Marino. Leigh has lofty goals ahead as it chases its first CCS title in four years.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Celtics set NBA record for 3-pointers in a season, passing Warriors' mark from 2022-23
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — The Boston Celtics' season started with a record-tying 3-point night. It was a sign of things to come. The Celtics broke the NBA record for 3-pointers in a season Friday night in a victory over the Phoenix Suns. “We've got a really good team," star Jayson Tatum said.
item.dc:creator: BY KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Alex Ovechkin ties Wayne Gretzky's all-time NHL goal record
item.description: Alex Ovechkin is now one goal away from surpassing Wayne Gretzky as the NHL's all-time leading goal scorer. Ovechkin tied the "Great One" Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Carpenter homers twice, Flaherty wins in Detroit return, Tigers beat White Sox 7-4 in home opener
item.description: Kerry Carpenter hit a pair of solo home runs and the Detroit Tigers beat the Chicago White Sox 7-4 Friday for their 14th win in their last 17 home openers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: WNBA star Elena Delle Donne retires after 11 seasons and the 2019 championship
item.description: Elena Delle Donne is officially retiring from professional basketball after not playing last year and dealing with injuries and illnesses throughout her entire career.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Giants home opener game Friday celebrating 25th season at Oracle Park
item.description: The San Francisco Giants are starting their 25th Major League Baseball season at Oracle Park on Friday with their home opener game against the Seattle Mariners. At 1:35 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: USC star JuJu Watkins is the AP Player of the Year and just the fourth sophomore to earn that honor
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — JuJu Watkins, the sensational sophomore who led Southern California to its best season in nearly 40 years, was honored Thursday as The Associated Press women’s basketball Player of the Year.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chicagoland foursome heads to Augusta for Drive, Chip and Putt Finals
item.description: GOLF, Ill. - Mastering golf can take a lifetime. Luckily, these four started early. "When I was like 2, I was holding a plastic club, watching a golf tournament - I don't remember which one," remembered 12-year-old Winnetka native Jack Kemper.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: Cubs, Seiya Suzuki look to stay sizzling when they return to Wrigley Field
item.description: WEST SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — Pull out the hand warmers. Seiya Suzuki is headed home to Wrigley Field at last, and he promises to be well prepared for whatever chilly elements he faces in an unpredictable Chicago spring.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Houston blows past the Jazz, 143-105
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - The end of the season can't come soon enough for the Utah Jazz. Jalen Green scored 22 points, while Alperen Sengun was one assist away from a triple-double, as the Houston Rockets crushed the Jazz Wednesday night, 143-105.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Pepperdine golfers overcome wildfires to compete in Augusta
item.description: Jeneath Wong and Eunseo Choi, two golfers from Pepperdine University, have arrived in Augusta, Georgia for the Augusta National Women's Amateur, after narrowly avoiding the recent Malibu wildfires that ravaged their campus in California.
item.dc:creator: Barclay Bishop, Fox 5

item.title: Caleb Williams' development, Bears search for "weapons" and Kyler Gordon's contract extension with The Athletic's Kevin Fishbain
item.description: The Chicago Bears are looking to develop Caleb Williams and use their top draft picks to bolster their offense, while also focusing on adding a dynamic running back and working on a contract extension for Kyler Gordon.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: Padres pick up another win, making for single best start to season ever
item.description: The San Diego Padres have made history after beating the Cleveland Guardians 7-2 at Petco Park on Monday, giving them a five-game winning streak to start the season for the first time ever.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz clinch worst record in franchise history
item.description: CHARLOTTE (ABC4 Sports) - It's official. The 2024-25 Utah Jazz will have the worst record in franchise history. Miles Bridges had 26 points, 10 rebounds and eight assists and the Charlotte Hornets defeated the Jazz 110-106 on Monday night hand Utah is 60th loss of the season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes lose to Butler in College Basktball Crown
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - The Runnin' Utes got one more opportunity to play this season, but lost to Butler in the inaugural College Basketball Crown tournament in Las Vegas Monday, 86-84. Keanu Dawes, who entered the transfer portal last week, led the Utes with 19 points and 11 rebounds.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lee Cummard named BYU women's basketball coach
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU has named Lee Cummard as its next women's basketball head coach. Cummard has been the interim head coach since Amber Whiting resigned after three seasons on March 8.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kanon Catchings enters transfer portal
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After a disappointing freshman season, BYU forward Kanon Catchings has entered the transfer portal. The highly-touted 4-star recruit came to BYU with high expectations. But injuries and lack of playing time derailed his freshman season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: A's debut home opener in Sacramento
item.description: (KRON) – For the first time in 57 years, Bay Area Athletics fans will not be able to drive to the ballpark to watch the A's play at the Oakland Coliseum. However, fans can drive 68 miles north on Interstate 80 for the A’s new home: Sutter Health Park in West Sacramento.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Utah snaps 3-game skid with 5-2 win at Chicago
item.description: CHICAGO (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club continues to fight for its slim playoff hopes. Alex Kerfoot had a goal and two assists for the Utah Hockey Club in a 5-2 victory against the Chicago Blackhawks at United Center on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Min Woo Lee holds off Scheffler and Woodland to win Houston Open for first PGA Tour title
item.description: Min Woo Lee kept his calm amid tremendous charges by Scottie Scheffler and Gary Woodland, winning the Houston Open on Sunday for his first PGA Tour title with the best lag of his life that set up a final par for a one-shot victory.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New Mexico taps UC San Diego's Eric Olen to replace Richard Pitino
item.description: New Mexico hired UC San Diego's Eric Olen on Sunday as its next basketball coach. Olen will replace Richard Pitino, who left to become Xavier's coach on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Duke and Florida move on to Final Four
item.description: Florida and Duke won their regions on Saturday, with fellow top seeds Houston and Auburn set to play on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Mavericks outlast Bulls 120-119 to pad lead in play-in race
item.description: Klay Thompson scored 20 points, P.J. Washington had 19 and the Dallas Mavericks beat the Chicago Bulls 120-119 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bueckers has career-high 40 to lead one-woman March Madness rout for UConn, 82-59 over Oklahoma
item.description: Paige Bueckers scored a career-high 40 points, rescuing UConn from its first-half doldrums and single-handedly turning a tight game against Oklahoma into an 82-59 rout on Saturday that sent the Huskies to the Elite Eight of the women's NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Betts, top overall seed UCLA look for March Madness success in Elite Eight meeting with LSU
item.description: With back-to-back games of at least 30 points and 10 or more rebounds, UCLA center Lauren Betts certainly appears unstoppable. But, LSU has thwarted the Bruins before — in the Sweet 16 of last years women’s NCAA Tournament. They'll get a rematch on Sunday, this time in the Elite Eight.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Luge officials predict 2026 Olympic sliding races will be in Italy, a good sign for Milan-Cortina
item.description: Next year's Olympic sliding races will be in Italy after all, international luge officials predicted Saturday in another ringing endorsement of the newly rebuilt track in Cortina d'Ampezzo.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5
